title: senecio borysthenicus
intro: Senecio borysthenicus, also known as Borysthenica or Kalmia, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, and is also believed to have antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. The herbal preparations of Senecio borysthenicus typically involve drying the leaves and stems, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
